bits.premise: His mixed race and drug-dealing math background make his family's three-fifths joke numerically wrong.
When people ask which parent is Black or white, he hints at the answer by saying his mom is fat.
A performer ruined by throat cancer becomes a mime.

lines.text: - Let me hear some noise, Austin.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I just want to give you an introduction of myself on mix,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: black and white.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I dropped out of school and learned all my math
lines.label: setup

lines.text: from drug dealing.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I'm actually the best
lines.label: setup

lines.text: of my whole family at math, right?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'Cause I'm half black,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: the rest of my family I hang around is white.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: But for some reason, they always refer to me as three-fifths.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Which I never understood
lines.label: tag

lines.text: 'cause the fraction is actually one-half.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: But it's hard being mixed, you know,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'cause people always get so nosy,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I always have to ask the same question like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: oh, which parent is mixed?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Which parent is black?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Which parent is white, you know?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: But I never tell them, I just kind of give them a hint.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Someone's like, is your mom black or is your mom white?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I was like, "Um, my mom is fat."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: And for the white people to understand that,
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I just don't know my dad, that's the real reason.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: But yeah, man, I feel like human connection
lines.label: setup

lines.text: is really important.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I talked to a guy the other day, I said,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Yeah, man, I'm a comedian."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: He said, "Wow, I was an actor in New York for 10 years,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and then I sung in the opera for five years,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and then my whole career got ruined
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'cause I got throat cancer.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So now he's a mime."
lines.label: punchline
